samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_8bit">
    <description>Implement a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit signed or unsigned integers. and the inputs are two 8-bit operands. The module accepts a dividend and a divisor as inputs and provides a 16-bit result containing both the quotient and the remainder. The design supports both signed and unsigned division operations.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock signal used for synchronous operation.</input>
        <input id="rst">The reset signal to initialize or reset the module.</input>
        <input id="sign">1-bit indicates if the operation is signed (1) or unsigned (0).</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input signal representing the dividend for division.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">8-bit input signal representing the divisor for division.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">1-bit indicates that a valid operation request is present.</input>
        <output id="res_ready">1-bit indicates that the 16-bit output result has already been acknowledged.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">16-bit the output containing the remainder in the upper 8 bits and the quotient in the lower 8 bits.</output>
        <output id="res_valid">1-bit output signal indicating the result is valid and ready.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="DIVIDE_START">1'b1</param>
        <param id="DIVIDE_END">1'b0</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="sequential_logic">
        <reg id="res_valid_reg" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="res_ready_reg" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="start_cnt" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="sign_dividend" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="sign_divisor" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="sign_result" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="neg_sign_divisor" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="neg_sign_dividend" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="neg_sign_result" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="cnt" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="dividend_save" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="divisor_save" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <reg id="SR" init_value="1'b0"/>
        <always_comb>
            if(rst == 1'b1)begin
                res_valid = 1'b0;
            end else if(cnt == 1'b1 && cnt == 1'b1)begin
                res_valid = 1'b1;
            end else if(res_valid == 1'b1 && res_ready == 1'b1)begin
                res_valid = 1'b0;
            end else begin
                res_valid = res_valid;
            end
        end
        <always_comb>
            if(rst == 1'b1)begin
                res_ready = 1'b0;
            end else if(cnt == 1'b1 && cnt == 1'b1)begin
                res_ready = 1'b1;
            end else if(res_valid == 1'b1 && res_ready == 1'b1)begin
                res_ready = 1'b0;
            end else begin
                res_ready = res_ready;
            end
        end
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // TODO: Please add your logic design here
        // Delete this line after adding your implementation
        reg [7:0] dividend_save;
        reg [7:0] divisor_save;
        reg [15:0] SR;
        reg [3:0] cnt;
        reg start_cnt;
        reg sign_dividend;
        reg sign_divisor;
        reg sign_result;
        reg neg_sign_divisor;
        reg neg_sign_dividend;
        reg neg_sign_result;
        
        always @(posedge clk) begin
            if(opn_valid == 1'b1 && res_valid == 1'b0)begin
                dividend_save <= dividend;
                divisor_save <= divisor;
                sign_dividend <= sign & dividend[7];
                sign_divisor <= sign & divisor[7];
                sign_result <= sign_dividend ^ sign_divisor;
                neg_sign_divisor <= ~(|divisor);
                neg_sign_dividend <= ~(|dividend);
                neg_sign_result <= ~(sign_dividend | sign_divisor);
                SR <= {dividend, 1'b0};
                cnt <= 1'b1;
                start_cnt <= DIVIDE_START;
            end else if(start_cnt == DIVIDE_START)begin
                if(cnt[3] == 1'b1)begin
                    cnt <= 1'b0;
                    start_cnt <= DIVIDE_END;
                    SR <= {SR[14:0], 1'b0} + {NEG_DIVISOR, 7'b0};
                    if(SR[15] == 1'b1)begin
                        SR[15:8] <= SR[15:8] + 1'b1;
                        SR[7:0] <= SR[7:0] - {NEG_DIVISOR, 7'b0};
                    end else begin
                        SR[15:8] <= SR[15:8];
                        SR[7:0] <= SR[7:0];
                    end
                end else begin
                    cnt <= cnt + 1'b1;
                    SR <= {SR[14:0], 1'b0} + {NEG_DIVISOR, 7'b0};
                    if(SR[15] == 1'b1)begin
                        SR[15:8] <= SR[15:8] + 1'b1;
                        SR[7:0] <= SR[7:0] - {NEG_DIVISOR, 7'b0};
                    end else begin
                        SR[15:8] <= SR[15:8];
                        SR[7:0] <= SR[7:0];
                    end
                end
            end else begin
                cnt <= cnt;
                start_cnt <= DIVIDE_END;
                SR <= SR;
            end
        end
        
        assign result = {SR[15:8], SR[7:0]};
    </implementation>
    
    <task>
        <description></description>
    </task>
</module>
